changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Backfill last_event_at for existing channels from their most recent event
changeSet.sql: -- Update each channel's last_event_at to the timestamp of its most recent event UPDATE channel c SET last_event_at = ( SELECT MAX(e.timestamp) FROM event e WHERE e.channel_id = c.id ) WHERE c.last_event_at IS NULL AND EXISTS ( SELECT 1 FROM event e WHERE e.channel_id = c.id );

changeSet.author: jordi.jaspers
changeSet.comment: Mark channels as stale if their last event was more than 7 days ago
changeSet.sql: -- Update is_stale flag based on last_event_at UPDATE channel SET is_stale = true WHERE last_event_at IS NOT NULL AND last_event_at < NOW() - INTERVAL '7 days';
